confirm.title: Write metadata into every epub?
confirm.withBackup: Every epub in this library will be rewritten with the metadata stored in NoirPanther. Originals are kept as .bak files next to the books.
confirm.withoutBackup: Every epub in this library will be rewritten with the metadata stored in NoirPanther. No backups will be kept.

delete.label: Smazat knihovny
delete.description:
Umožňuje uživateli odstranit existující knihovny.

manage.label: Správa serveru

Umožňuje uživateli spravovat server.

manage.label: Správa uživatelů

Allows the user to manage other users on the server.
Includes permissions to create and update

CHANGE_USERNAME.description: Allows the user to change their own username

CHANGE_AVATAR.description: Allows the user to change their own avatar

EMAILER_MANAGE.description: Allows the user to manage email configuration and settings

EMAILER_READ.description: Allows the user to view email configuration

EMAIL_ARBITRARY_SEND.description: Allows the user to send custom emails to any address

MANAGE_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to manage notification system settings

READ_SYSTEM_LOGS.description: Allows the user to view real-time system logs

READ_USERS.label: Read users
READ_USERS.description: Allows the user to view user account information

SCAN_LIBRARY.label: Scan libraries

UPLOAD_FILE.label: Upload files

MANAGE_JOBS.label: Manage jobs
MANAGE_JOBS.description: Allows the user to manage any queued jobs

merge.description: Move every book of this series into another series in the same library. The folder on disk is not touched, and future scans keep feeding the target series. Merges can be undone from the target series

delete.heading: Delete series
delete.description: Permanently remove this series and its books from NoirPanther. The files on disk are left untouched.

confirm.title: Delete this series?
confirm.description: Its books will be removed from the database. The files on disk are left untouched, and a future scan may re-import the series if its folder still exists. This cannot be undone.
